items.product_name: S&S Worldwide 25-1 PK36 Balsa-Wood Top Gun Glider Model Plane (Pack of 36)
items.category: Sports & Outdoors | Sports & Fitness | Accessories | Inflation Devices & Accessories
items.about_product: Make sure this fits by entering your model number. | ASSEMBLY IS QUICK & EASY: Only three pieces with no glue required, and instructions are conveniently printed on the packaging for each plane. | INEXPENSIVE PLAYTIME OPTION: Offers hours of fun without a hefty price tag. | PERFECT FOR PARTY/EVENT FAVORS: 36 planes per pack mean it’s perfect for Birthday Parties, Wedding Favors, Invites or Giveaways. | A BLAST TO DECORATE: Put a personal twist on each plane by decorating it to your liking with markers, paint, paint pens, glitter, washi tape and more… | MADE IN THE USA: Each plane is made of genuine balsa wood and measure 6” in length with an 8” wingspan.
items.product_specification: Product Dimensions:         9.5 x 8.5 x 2.2 inches ; 6.7 ounces    |Shipping Weight: 8 ounces (View shipping rates and policies)|ASIN: B000HIYQL4|Item model number: 25-1 PK36|    #80    in Paper Airplane Construction Kits    |    #142    in Inflation Devices & Accessories
items.technical_details: Ready-to-fly genuine balsa wood model by Guillen. Nothing flies like balsa! 6"L. Wings measure 8"W. Made in the USA. Pack of 36.
items.description: Take flight with the S&S Worldwide Balsa Wood Top Gun Glider! This 36-pack of lightweight, easy-to-assemble gliders provides hours of outdoor fun. Perfect for kids and adults, these balsa wood planes are ideal for improving hand-eye coordination and enjoying simple, classic flight.  Great for schools, parties, or individual play.

items.category: Pet Supplies | Dogs | Apparel & Accessories | Costumes
items.about_product: Patriotic Pup costume for 4th of July or any day of the year | Includes stars and stripes bodysuit and hat | CONSULT THE RUBIE’S PET SIZE CHART and watch the measuring instructions video before selecting size | Great for a party, parade, photo shoot or play date | Rubie's offers fun costumes year-round for every member of the family
items.product_specification: Product Dimensions:         10 x 2 x 20 inches ; 3 pounds    |Shipping Weight: 4 ounces (View shipping rates and policies)|Domestic Shipping: Item can be shipped within U.S.|International Shipping: This item is not eligible for international shipping.  Learn More|ASIN: B001BQ1K1A|Item model number: 885950 S|    #1773    in Dog Costumes
items.technical_details: Size:Small show up to 2 reviews by default Uncle Sam wants YOU to give him treats and snuggles If your pup isn't demanding already, get them in this Uncle Sam USA Dog Costume by Rubies Costume Company and you'll never be able to say no to their wants. Designed for only the most fashion forward pets, Rubie's collection of pet costumes features hundreds of nonlicensed and licensed costumes for yearround fun Patriotic Pup costume for July 4th or any day Includes bodysuit and matching hat Rubie's offers fun costumes yearround for every member of the family
items.description: Celebrate the 4th of July in style with Rubie's Uncle Sam Pet Costume!  This adorable outfit transforms your furry friend into a patriotic pup.  Perfect for parades, parties, or photos, this high-quality dog costume ensures a comfortable and fun fit.  Order your dog's Uncle Sam costume today!

RESOLUTION: The defective item replacement policy takes precedence, and as an exception for customer satisfaction, a courtesy credit is also being provided. TRADE-OFF: Customer receives both a free replacement and an account credit, exceeding standard policy but within discretionary support limits for exceptional circumstances.
